title: The Rock of the Yoshinagas
overview: A month after Futaba obtained him, Gar-kun is gaining a bad reputation. Gar-kun assists the police and Avery, the guide dog, to capture criminals.

title: Clash! Angel and Devil
overview: Futaba is lured to the Higashimiya mansion.

title: The Stolen Girl
overview: Kaito Hyakushiki appears and rescues Lili from her father.

title: The Heart That Doesn't Show in the Mirror
overview: The battles for both Lili and the Philosopher's Stone continue.

title: The Singing Voice of the Mountain
overview: Iyo gives Futaba a helmet which has the ability to allow her to communicate with plants.

title: I Can't Hear Your Song Anymore
Lovely Lily And The Headless Dullahan
overview: Dullahan breaks out of the Hamilton research facility and goes after Lily who is home alone.

title: Gargoyle of the Silver Snow
overview: Gar-kun is given a new ability.

title: Lily the Thief
overview: Lily and Dullahan take over for Hyakushiki who is ill.

title: Shopping District Rhapsody
overview: Gar-kun and his friends help rectify the shopping district merchants' declining popularity due to a large department store opening nearby.

title: The Puppet, and the Red String It Found
overview: Momo, the younger sister of Kazumi's classmate and a member of their school's drama club, makes Kazumi a gift to show him her affection.

title: A Married Couple's Quarrel is Another Flower of the Festival
overview: Goshiki is getting ready for the festival but one of Papa's old friends has plans to use it to advertise for the department store.

title: All's Well if the Festival Goes Well!
overview: During the festival, Lily's father and the Zachore leader cause chaos on the shopping district by using a stolen artifact on the shrine's Sakura tree.
